docs.title: Hi, I'm Amit Kumar Ram
docs.text: Committed to continuous learning and professional growth in cybersecurity. I break things, understand why they break, and write it all up so the knowledge doesn't stay locked away.

docs.title: About Me
docs.text: SOC Analyst aspirant with 4 years of Python development experience and hands-on cybersecurity training from TryHackMe. Skilled in Python, Linux, log analysis, SIEM, and threat detection. Passionate about cybersecurity and actively seeking SOC Analyst opportunities.

docs.title: CORE SKILLS
docs.text:
• Security Monitoring & SIEM: Splunk (Alert Triage, Log Analysis, SPL Queries), ELK Stack, Log Correlation, Event Monitoring.

  • Incident Response & Threat Intel: Threat Triage, IOC Analysis, Security Alerts Handling, MITRE ATT&CK Framework.

  • Networking & Packet Analysis: Wireshark (Network Traffic & Packet Analysis), TCP/IP, DNS, HTTP/HTTPS, OSI Model.

  • Security Automation & Scripting: Python (Custom Recon Tools, Log Parsers, Automation Scripts), Bash/Shell Scripting.

  • Application & OS Security: OWASP Top 10 mitigation, Vulnerability Assessment, Windows Event Logs, Linux Hardening.

  • Tools & Platforms: Nmap, Burp Suite (Basics), Metasploit, Endpoint Security Concepts.

docs.title: CYBERSECURITY LABS & EXPERTISE  SOC Operations & Threat Hunting — TryHackMe Labs
docs.text:
• SIEM Operations (Splunk): Conducted log analysis, correlated data sources, and created custom SPL queries to identify malicious activity, brute-force attacks, and insider threats.
  • Network Traffic Analysis (Wireshark): Analyzed packet captures (.pcap) to detect common attack patterns, Command-and-Control (C2) traffic, and unauthorized data exfiltration.
  • Endpoint & Defense Security: Monitored Windows Event Logs and Linux system logs to detect unauthorized access, privilege escalation, and configuration drifts.

docs.title: PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE
docs.text:
• Python Developer (Security-Focused) | Sajvik Systems Pvt. Ltd., Jamshedpur (Jan 2025 – Mar 2025) — Developed and secured Django-based web applications, implementing authentication, input validation, secure configurations, and security log monitoring.
  • Python Developer (Backend & Secure Coding) | IVAN Infotech, Kolkata (Jul 2022 – Sep 2023) — Built healthcare applications using Flask and Django, performed security-focused code reviews and testing, and managed PostgreSQL/MongoDB databases with RBAC controls.
  • Python Developer (Secure APIs) | Dibwas Websoft Technologies LLP, Kolkata (Nov 2021 – Jun 2022) — Developed RESTful APIs using Flask and Swagger with token-based authentication and secure database access practices.
  • Python Developer (Data Analysis & Automation) | AIinHome Technologies Pvt. Ltd., Kolkata (Nov 2019 – Dec 2020) — Performed data analysis and automation using Python, focusing on anomaly detection, data validation, and secure data processing workflows.
  • Python Automation Developer | JECC Sourcing Pvt. Ltd., Kolkata (Nov 2018 – Nov 2019) — Developed Python automation solutions for large-scale data processing, validation, and secure data handling.

docs.title: CERTIFICATIONS & TRAINING
docs.text:
• SOC Level 1 Training – TryHackMe (SIEM, Endpoint Monitoring, Incident Handling)
  • Cyber Security 101 Training – TryHackMe (Networking, Cryptography, Defensive Security)
  • Certified Ethical Hacking Professional – Indian Cyber Security Solutions
